title: Dalanzadgad Heat Wave
lead: Dalanzadgad is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Dalanzadgad is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.7 GG. 
 The low humidity of 5% and strong winds of 28.4 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the intense heat, making it a critical situation for the city.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
